one_time_description: Earnings from investments in Nation business entities (modified equity method) - primarily Mikisew Commercial Trust earnings of $24,074,984
economic_notes: Nation holds 13 Government Business Enterprises including Mikisew Commercial Trust, Fort McMurray Super 8 Limited Partnership, MBH Fort McMurray Hotel Limited Partnership, Mikisew Industrial Supply Ltd., Guthrie Mechanical Services Ltd., and others. Land claim settled in 1986 receiving $26,600,000 and 24,000 acres. Agricultural Benefits Claim settled in 2018 receiving $135,972,938 held in Whachask Trust. Oti-Nikan Community Trust established 2020 for impact benefit agreements and land claims.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Chief and Council instructed management to exclude condensed financial information of subsidiary business entities from Note 5 as required under modified equity method. 13 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with total investment of $81,279,121 and earnings of $23,427,612 recorded as other items below operations line. Agricultural Benefits Claim liability of $30,366,682 still outstanding to members. Oti-Nikan Community Trust balance dropped significantly from $8,863,433 to $259,701. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $32,296,815 + FNDF $884,927 + GoA $749,640 + CMHC $481,237 + ASETS $656,403 = $35,068,022. OSR includes Other revenue, Investment income, Industry relations, Industry related funds, Whachask Trust income, Oti-Nikan income, Technical Services revenue. Long-term debt note appears truncated in source document.
